title: 10 Dividend Growth Stocks For November 2023
text: In my monthly series of 10 Dividend Growth Stocks, I rank a selection of Dividend Radar stocks and present the 10 top-ranked stocks for further research and possible investment. This month, I'm presenting high-quality stocks with the highest defensiveness scores based on a scoring system developed by David Van Knapp. I ranked candidates by considering, in turn, their Dividend Safety Scores and their Beta measure of volatility.

title: Here's Why You Must Buy Brown & Brown (BRO) Stock Right Now
text: Brown & Brown (BRO) continues to gain from robust new businesses, premium rate increases across the majority of business lines, expansion initiatives, strategic acquisitions and a strong financial position.

title: Why Is Brown & Brown (BRO) Up 6.3% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Brown & Brown (BRO) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Bridge Specialty Group announces appointment of Tim Coles as chief executive officer for European brokerage operations
text: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla., Nov. 22, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Bridge Specialty Group, the Wholesale Brokerage segment of Brown & Brown, Inc. (NYSE: BRO), announced that Tim Coles has been named chief executive officer (CEO) for the European brokerage operations of Bridge Specialty Group, effective January 1, 2024.

title: RLI Approves Special Cash Dividend to Share More Profit
text: RLI's board of directors approves a special cash dividend of $2.00 per share, supported by sufficient liquidity and strong cash flow to enhance its shareholders' value.

title: 5 Stocks to Buy From the Prospering Insurance Brokerage Industry
text: Increased demand for insurance products, given an aging population, baby boomers and millennials, and the adoption of technology should drive insurance brokers like MMC, AON, AJG, BRO, and ERIE.
